rule_metadata.author: Muhammad Faisal (@faisalusuf)
rule_metadata.title: Bitbucket Unauthorized Access To A Resource

rules.rule_text:
title: Bitbucket Unauthorized Access To A Resource
id: 7215374a-de4f-4b33-8ba5-70804c9251d3
status: test
description: Detects unauthorized access attempts to a resource.
references:
- https://confluence.atlassian.com/bitbucketserver/audit-log-events-776640423.html
author: Muhammad Faisal (@faisalusuf)
date: 2024-02-25
tags:
- attack.resource-development
- attack.t1586
logsource:
  product: bitbucket
  service: audit
  definition: 'Requirements: "Advance" log level is required to receive these audit
    events.'
detection:
  selection:
    auditType.category: Security
    auditType.action: Unauthorized access to a resource
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Access attempts to non-existent repositories or due to outdated plugins. Usually
  "Anonymous" user is reported in the "author.name" field in most cases.
level: critical
